technology.title: Hong Kong can be more than New York and Silicon Valley combined: Paul Chan
technology.summary: Hong Kong can be “more than New York and Silicon Valley combined” by positioning itself as a hub that integrates global financial depth with technological innovation and manufacturing capacity, the city’s finance chief has said. Financial Secretary Paul Chan Mo-po said on Friday that Hong Kong had a unique edge over New York and Silicon Valley, thanks to advanced manufacturing capabilities that its American rivals lacked, which were the result of integration with the Greater Bay Area. Speaking...

briefing.news_focus: Hong Kong can be “more than New York and Silicon Valley combined” by positioning itself as a hub that integrates global financial depth with technological innovation and manufacturing capacity, the city’s finance chief has said. Financial Secretary Paul Chan Mo-po said on Friday that Hong Kong had a unique edge over New York and Silicon Valley, thanks to advanced manufacturing capabilities that its American rivals lacked, which were the result of integration with the Greater Bay Area. Speaking...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 香港財政司司長陳茂波表示，香港有潛力成為一個超越紐約和矽谷的全球金融與科技創新中心。他指出，香港擁有先進的製造能力，這是其美國競爭對手所缺乏的，並且這種優勢源於與大灣區的整合。陳茂波在發表演講時強調了香港的獨特競爭力，並呼籲加強科技與金融的結合。
briefing.background: 香港作為全球金融中心，面臨來自其他城市的競爭，尤其是紐約和矽谷。這些城市在科技創新方面具有深厚的歷史和資源優勢。然而，香港的地理位置及其與大灣區的聯繫，使其在製造能力上具備獨特優勢。隨著中國政府推動科技創新和經濟轉型，香港希望利用這一機會，吸引更多科技企業和投資者，進一步提升其在全球市場中的地位。
briefing.analysis: 陳茂波的言論反映了香港政府希望重新定位城市形象的努力，強調其在金融與科技領域的潛力。與此同時，參考報導提到的其他國家如印度、巴西、阿聯酋和非洲，則顯示出全球範圍內對科技基礎設施的需求正在增加，這些地區正因應計算資源的稀缺而推動AI創新。這意味著，香港若能有效整合其金融與製造優勢，可能會吸引來自這些新興市場的企業與投資者，形成競爭優勢。然而，香港也需面對內部與外部的挑戰，包括政策環境、人才流失及國際關係的變化，這些都可能影響其未來發展。

supporting_titles: Scarcity is driving AI innovation outside Silicon Valley
supporting_summaries: New AI infrastructure is emerging in India, Brazil, the UAE, and Africa, where local stacks are designed to get around compute scarcity.

technology.title: The US Is Requiring Foreign Influencers to Get Work Visas for the 2026 World Cup
technology.summary: FIFA announced agreements with platforms such as TikTok and YouTube that include the participation of dozens of international influencers to generate content in the three host countries.

briefing.news_focus: FIFA announced agreements with platforms such as TikTok and YouTube that include the participation of dozens of international influencers to generate content in the three host countries.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國政府要求參加2026年世界盃的外國網紅必須獲得工作簽證。這一政策是FIFA與TikTok及YouTube等平台達成的協議的一部分，旨在促進這三個主辦國的內容創作，並吸引國際網紅參與活動。
briefing.background: 2026年世界盃將在美國、加拿大和墨西哥舉行，這是首次由三個國家共同主辦的世界盃賽事。隨著社交媒體的興起，網紅在大型活動中的影響力日益增強，FIFA希望透過與這些平台的合作，提升賽事的曝光率和參與度。美國政府的簽證政策反映了對外國網紅進入國內市場的管理需求，特別是在大型國際活動期間，這可能影響到網紅的參與方式和內容創作。
briefing.analysis: 美國政府的簽證要求可能會對外國網紅的參與造成障礙，尤其是那些未能及時獲得簽證的創作者。這一政策的實施可能會引發對美國移民政策的討論，並影響到其他國際活動的參與模式。另一方面，這也可能促使更多的本地創作者參與，因為他們不受簽證限制。FIFA與社交媒體平台的合作，則顯示出體育賽事與數位媒體之間日益緊密的聯繫，未來可能會有更多類似的合作模式出現。

technology.title: After SpaceX’s huge IPO, Americans’ financial future will be bound to AI
technology.summary: They’re about to get more AI rammed down their throats, stuck into their pension plans and investment portfolios Americans are growing worried about what artificial intelligence portends for their futures. Eight in 10 Americans report concern over AI, compared with a third who report being excited, according to a recent Quinnipiac poll. More than half think it will do more harm than good in their daily lives. Seven out of 10 think it will reduce the number of available jobs. Skeptical though they may be, they are about to get more AI rammed down their throats and stuck into their pension plans and their investment portfolios, whether they want it or not – binding their futures ever more tightly to the frenzied, risky, multibillion-dollar dash by technology moguls to develop machines capable of mimicking human thought processes to take over cognitive tasks. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: They’re about to get more AI rammed down their throats, stuck into their pension plans and investment portfolios Americans are growing worried about what artificial intelligence portends for their futures. Eight in 10 Americans report concern over AI, compared with a third who report being excited, according to a recent Quinnipiac poll. More than half think it will do more harm than good in their daily lives. Seven out of 10 think it will reduce the number of available jobs. Skeptical though they may be, they are about to get more AI rammed down their throats and stuck into their pension plans and their investment portfolios, whether they want it or not – binding their futures ever more tightly to the frenzied, risky, multibillion-dollar dash by technology moguls to develop machines capable of mimicking human thought processes to take over cognitive tasks. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著SpaceX的巨大IPO，美國民眾的財務未來將越來越依賴人工智慧（AI）。根據最近的Quinnipiac民調，八成美國人對AI感到擔憂，只有三分之一的人表示興奮。超過一半的受訪者認為AI對日常生活的影響將多於好處，七成認為AI將減少可用的工作機會。儘管民眾持懷疑態度，AI將被強行納入他們的退休計畫和投資組合，進一步將他們的未來與科技巨頭們的風險投資緊密相連。
briefing.background: 在當前的科技環境中，人工智慧的迅速發展引發了廣泛的關注與討論。隨著企業如SpaceX等進行IPO，資金流入AI技術的研發，這不僅影響了市場動態，也改變了投資者的策略。美國的退休計畫和投資組合越來越多地納入AI相關資產，這使得普通投資者的財務未來與AI的發展風險緊密相連。這種情況引發了民眾對於AI可能帶來的工作流失和生活質量下降的擔憂，尤其是在經濟不穩定的背景下。
briefing.analysis: 美國民眾對AI的擔憂反映了對未來工作的焦慮，尤其是AI技術可能取代傳統職位的風險。儘管有三分之一的人對AI持正面看法，但大多數人仍然擔心其潛在的負面影響。這種情況可能導致政策制定者和企業在推廣AI技術時需要更加謹慎，以平衡技術創新與社會穩定之間的矛盾。此外，隨著AI技術的普及，投資者可能需要重新評估其投資組合，以應對未來市場的變化。這場技術革命的進程將如何影響不同社會階層的經濟狀況，仍需持續觀察。

politics.title: China arrests US academic at conference for ‘espionage activities’
politics.summary: Arrest of Min Zin, who writes about Myanmar and Chinese foreign policy, comes just month after Trump visit to Beijing China has arrested a US scholar who writes about Myanmar and Chinese foreign policy on suspicion of spying. Min Zin was suspected of “engaging in espionage activities that endanger China’s national security,” China’s ministry of foreign affairs spokesperson, Lin Jian, said on Friday. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Arrest of Min Zin, who writes about Myanmar and Chinese foreign policy, comes just month after Trump visit to Beijing China has arrested a US scholar who writes about Myanmar and Chinese foreign policy on suspicion of spying. Min Zin was suspected of “engaging in espionage activities that endanger China’s national security,” China’s ministry of foreign affairs spokesperson, Lin Jian, said on Friday. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國在一場會議上逮捕了美國學者Min Zin，理由是涉嫌從事危害中國國家安全的間諜活動。Min Zin專注於緬甸及中國外交政策的研究。中國外交部發言人林劍於週五確認了此事件，並指出此舉是在特朗普訪問北京後的一個月內發生的。
briefing.background: 此次逮捕發生在中美兩國關係緊張的背景下。隨著中國在全球影響力的擴大，對外國學者的監控和限制也日益加強。Min Zin的研究主題涉及緬甸的政治局勢，這在當前的地緣政治環境中尤為敏感。中國政府對於任何可能影響其國家安全的活動持有高度警覺，尤其是在外國學者的研究可能涉及敏感議題時。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件反映了中美之間日益加劇的緊張關係，特別是在學術交流和情報安全方面的摩擦。中國政府可能認為Min Zin的研究可能對其國家安全構成威脅，這與美國學術界對中國的批評形成鮮明對比。參考報導中提到的中國外交部確認逮捕的消息，強調了中國在此事件中的立場，即堅決打擊間諜活動。未來可能出現的後續發展包括美方對此事件的強烈反應，可能會影響兩國在學術和外交領域的互動。

supporting_titles: China arrests US researcher it says is suspected of ‘spying’
supporting_summaries: Beijing's Foreign Ministry confirms US reports about detention of scholar focusing on politics of neighbouring Myanmar.

politics.title: White House correspondents’ dinner shooting: A look at previous assassination attempts on President Donald Trump
politics.summary: The White House correspondents’ dinner shooting was not the first time that the U.S. President Donald Trump found himself at the centre of a security scare

briefing.news_focus: The White House correspondents’ dinner shooting was not the first time that the U.S. President Donald Trump found himself at the centre of a security scare
briefing.news_focus_zh: 在白宮記者晚宴上發生了一起槍擊事件，這使得美國總統唐納德·特朗普再次成為安全風險的焦點。此次事件並非特朗普首次面臨此類安全威脅，歷史上曾有多次針對他的暗殺企圖。
briefing.background: 特朗普在任內曾多次遭遇安全威脅，這些事件反映出美國政治環境的高度緊張與分裂。隨著社會對政治人物的情緒反應加劇，特別是在社交媒體的影響下，對總統的安全保護需求也隨之上升。白宮記者晚宴作為一個重要的社交活動，通常會吸引大量媒體和公眾的關注，這也使得任何安全事件都會引發廣泛的討論和關注。
stakeholders: 反對特朗普的政治團體
briefing.analysis: 此次槍擊事件可能會引發對特朗普安全措施的重新評估，並促使政府加強對高層官員的保護措施。各方對此事件的反應可能會有所不同，支持特朗普的群體可能會將其視為政治迫害的證據，而反對者則可能會利用此事件來強調政治暴力的風險。未來，這類事件可能會影響特朗普的公眾形象及其政治活動的方式，尤其是在選舉期間，安全問題將成為重要議題。

politics.title: Iran war day 105: Trump halts attacks after Kharg Island threat
politics.summary: Trump cancels planned Iran attacks, saying talks are close to a result as Tehran reviews a proposed US deal.

briefing.news_focus: Trump cancels planned Iran attacks, saying talks are close to a result as Tehran reviews a proposed US deal.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國總統特朗普宣布取消對伊朗的攻擊計劃，並表示與德黑蘭的談判即將達成結果。此舉發生在伊朗對美國的提議進行審查之際，特別是在霍爾木茲海峽的緊張局勢仍然存在。
briefing.background: 自從伊朗與美國之間的緊張關係加劇以來，雙方一直在尋求解決方案。特朗普的最新聲明顯示出美方對於達成協議的期待，尤其是在伊朗外長發言人表示協議的主要部分已經敲定的背景下。然而，伊朗強調不會在其核心利益上妥協，這使得談判的前景變得複雜。此外，霍爾木茲海峽作為全球重要的石油運輸通道，其安全性對於國際市場至關重要。
briefing.analysis: 特朗普的決定反映出美方希望透過外交手段解決與伊朗的衝突，但伊朗方面對於協議的具體內容持謹慎態度。根據參考報導，伊朗方面對於特朗普的聲明表示懷疑，稱有關協議的報導為「推測性」。這顯示出雙方在談判中的信任缺失，可能會影響未來的進展。若伊朗堅持其紅線，則協議的達成可能會面臨挑戰。此外，霍爾木茲海峽的緊張局勢仍需關注，因為這可能成為雙方談判的關鍵因素。

supporting_titles: Donald Trump says Iran war deal close as Strait of Hormuz tensions linger
Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims deal to end Iran war near
supporting_summaries: Iranian media reported Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei as saying large parts of the agreement have been finalized, but Iran would not compromise on its red lines
Iran says reports of a deal are "speculative" after the US president says a "great settlement" to end the conflict has been reached.

economy.title: ECB raises eurozone interest rates as Iran war stokes inflation
economy.summary: European Central Bank increases main deposit rate to 2.25%, with two further rises expected by next spring Business live – latest updates The European Central Bank has raised interest rates for the first time since 2023 in response to higher inflation caused by the war in Iran. The ECB raised its main deposit rate from 2% to 2.25% in a move that financial markets expect to be the first of three rises by next spring. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: European Central Bank increases main deposit rate to 2.25%, with two further rises expected by next spring Business live – latest updates The European Central Bank has raised interest rates for the first time since 2023 in response to higher inflation caused by the war in Iran. The ECB raised its main deposit rate from 2% to 2.25% in a move that financial markets expect to be the first of three rises by next spring. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 歐洲中央銀行（ECB）首次自2023年以來提高歐元區利率，將主要存款利率從2%上調至2.25%。此舉是因應因伊朗戰爭引發的通脹壓力，市場預期未來還將有兩次加息，預計在明年春季之前完成。
briefing.background: 伊朗戰爭的爆發對全球經濟造成了顯著影響，特別是能源價格的上漲進一步推高了通脹率。歐洲中央銀行在面對持續的通脹壓力時，選擇提高利率以抑制物價上漲，這是其貨幣政策的一部分。此政策調整反映了ECB對經濟穩定的重視，尤其是在面對外部衝擊的情況下。此外，市場對於未來利率走勢的預期也影響了投資者的信心和行為。
briefing.analysis: 此次ECB加息的決策主要是為了應對因伊朗戰爭引發的通脹壓力，各方對此反應不一。支持加息的觀點認為，這是控制通脹的必要措施，能夠穩定經濟。然而，反對者則擔心加息可能會抑制經濟增長，特別是在全球經濟不確定性增加的背景下。此外，參考報導《經濟學人》提到，與伊朗戰爭相關的保險業務受到重大影響，這可能進一步加劇市場的不穩定性，並影響ECB的未來政策走向。整體而言，ECB的加息策略將在短期內引發市場波動，長期效果則需視通脹走勢及全球經濟狀況而定。

supporting_titles: Will UK interest rates go up?
The insurers on the hook for war in Iran
supporting_summaries: The interest rate set by the Bank of England affects mortgage, loan and savings rates for millions.
Some have been hammered; even those who haven’t might be soon

economy.title: Oil prices plummet as Trump claims he is close to US-Iran deal
economy.summary: Brent crude falls as optimism rises strait of Hormuz could reopen over the weekend Business live – latest updates Global oil prices fell on Friday to lows not seen since the first week of the Iran crisis after Donald Trump claimed he was close to reaching a peace deal with Tehran. The price of Brent crude began to tumble from about $93 a barrel in overnight trade after the US president called off further military strikes against Iran which were scheduled for the evening. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Brent crude falls as optimism rises strait of Hormuz could reopen over the weekend Business live – latest updates Global oil prices fell on Friday to lows not seen since the first week of the Iran crisis after Donald Trump claimed he was close to reaching a peace deal with Tehran. The price of Brent crude began to tumble from about $93 a barrel in overnight trade after the US president called off further military strikes against Iran which were scheduled for the evening. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 全球油價因特朗普宣稱接近與伊朗達成和平協議而大幅下跌，布倫特原油價格從每桶約93美元開始急劇下滑，創下自伊朗危機以來的最低點。特朗普的聲明包括取消原定於當晚對伊朗的軍事打擊，這使得市場對霍爾木茲海峽重新開放的樂觀情緒上升。
briefing.background: 近期，伊朗與美國之間的緊張局勢持續升級，導致全球油價波動。霍爾木茲海峽是全球重要的石油運輸通道，任何軍事衝突都可能影響石油供應，進而推高油價。特朗普政府的外交政策一直以強硬對伊朗為主，但隨著局勢的發展，特朗普的最新聲明顯示出希望透過外交手段解決衝突，這對市場情緒產生了直接影響。
briefing.analysis: 特朗普的聲明引發市場對油價的劇烈反應，顯示出投資者對地緣政治風險的敏感性。油價的下跌反映了市場對和平協議的期待，然而，這種樂觀情緒是否能持續仍然存在不確定性。若協議未能如預期達成，油價可能會再次上升，影響全球經濟。此外，特朗普的外交策略也可能受到國內外政治壓力的影響，未來幾天內的發展將是關鍵。

economy.title: The SpaceX factor: Hong Kong stocks face liquidity test from mega IPO
economy.summary: This is part of a series on the global impact of SpaceX’s historic IPO, tracing how mainland Chinese investors’ strategies, the Hong Kong market and wider capital flows are being reshaped by Elon Musk’s trillion‑dollar rocket gamble. While the world witnesses a new fundraising record in the coming listing of SpaceX – and the emergence of its CEO Elon Musk as the first-ever trillionaire – Hong Kong stocks face a critical liquidity test, as market enthusiasm reshapes fund flows and recalibrates...

briefing.news_focus: This is part of a series on the global impact of SpaceX’s historic IPO, tracing how mainland Chinese investors’ strategies, the Hong Kong market and wider capital flows are being reshaped by Elon Musk’s trillion‑dollar rocket gamble. While the world witnesses a new fundraising record in the coming listing of SpaceX – and the emergence of its CEO Elon Musk as the first-ever trillionaire – Hong Kong stocks face a critical liquidity test, as market enthusiasm reshapes fund flows and recalibrates...
briefing.news_focus_zh: SpaceX即將進行的IPO將創下全球募資紀錄，這一事件對香港股市的流動性造成了重大影響。隨著市場熱情的高漲，資金流向和投資策略正在重新調整，特別是來自中國大陸的投資者。這一變化可能會影響香港市場的資金流動性，進一步考驗其金融穩定性。
briefing.background: SpaceX的IPO標誌著一個新的募資高峰，這不僅是對太空產業的重大推動，也可能改變全球資本流動的格局。香港作為亞洲金融中心，長期以來吸引著大量外資，然而，近年來因地緣政治及政策變化，香港市場的流動性面臨挑戰。隨著SpaceX的上市，香港市場的資金流動可能會受到重新評估，尤其是來自中國大陸的資金流入與流出。
briefing.analysis: SpaceX的IPO可能會吸引大量資金，這對香港股市的流動性構成挑戰。參考報導中提到，日本的SpaceX股票基金已經停止接受新資金流入，顯示出投資者對於市場動態的謹慎態度。這可能反映出投資者對於香港市場未來流動性的擔憂，尤其是在中國大陸投資者的策略可能會受到影響的情況下。此外，《經濟學人》的報導指出，香港正逐漸恢復其金融活力，這可能與SpaceX的IPO有關，但也需注意北京的政策影響，這可能會對市場的長期穩定性產生影響。
